flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Binghamton University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($26.4k → $30.4k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Binghamton University rose 14% between 2006 and 2009 ($5.9k → $6.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Binghamton University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Binghamton University are 38% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($80.6k vs $58.3k).
